name: vibe-coding-rules
description: 🛡️ Stop AI from forgetting yesterday's bugs. 6 self-evolving coding discipline Skills: breadcrumb memory, auto rule growth, progressive L1/L2/L3, pre-check → safe-exec → 28-rule post-check → auto-test → changelog. Closed-loop delivery. | 给AI装上编程纪律：🍞面包屑记忆永不遗忘、规则自进化越用越聪明、渐进式采纳不浪费上下文、改前自查→改后自检→自动测试→变更记录，一条龙闭环交付。由代码小白用AI写14万行代码的踩坑经验沉淀。
